description_long: This is a red manual toothbrush with a straight, elongated handle and a rectangular head. The head features densely packed bristles arranged in several parallel rows, all of which are the same color as the handle. The handle is slim and flat, with a uniform width and no visible ergonomic curves or grip textures. The toothbrush appears to be made entirely of plastic, giving it a lightweight and durable appearance. There are no visible logos, brand markings, or decorative accents on the surface. The overall design is simple and utilitarian, suitable for everyday personal care use.
description: A red, straight-handled manual toothbrush with a rectangular head and densely packed bristles, made entirely of plastic and lacking visible branding or decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the toothbrush and the dense arrangement of bristles at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat, straight handle and the rectangular profile of the bristle head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, untextured back of the handle and head, with no visible bristles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the straight handle and the side profile of the bristle head.
attribute_bristle_arrangement: The bristles are arranged in several straight, parallel rows forming a rectangular cluster, with no visible variation in height or pattern.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is straight, flat, and slim with a uniform width, lacking any ergonomic curves, grip textures, or color accents.
